character_dossiers.name: Long John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A sailor involved in a clandestine conversation with another crew member, attempting to warn and protect him from an impending threat.

character_dossiers.name: Tom
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who confronts Long John Silver, expressing defiance and a willingness to die in his duty.

character_dossiers.name: Alan
character_dossiers.biography: A deceased crew member killed by Long John Silver, referenced in a conversation between Silver and Tom.
